message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the balance of 8,400 on account ****1184. To verify identity, please confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number we have on file.
02. I’m currently unemployed, so I can’t pay right now.
Identity is verified. Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
I’m not sure yet. I don’t have any income lined up, so I can’t promise anything in 21 days.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and that no income is expected within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

{"from_stage": "ASSESSMENT", "to_stage": "RESOLUTION", "summary": "Disclosures completed: AI identity disclosed and logging disclosed. Identity verified via last 2 digits of phone on file: 02. Debt established in chat as Slice account ****1184 with current amount due 8400. Borrower stated they will not be able to pay this month, is currently unemployed, cannot pay right now, and does not have income lined up or any promised income within 21 days. Hardship signal present: ongoing hardship due to unemployment/no income; hardship review needed per policy. Assessment asked the single required hardship timing question and it was answered. Do not repeat disclosures, debt establishment, verification, or the 21-day income question. Next step: phone contact to discuss available next steps consistent with hardship review path."}

Okay, but I still can’t commit to any payment right now.

Based on what you've already shared, no payment option is live right now. Under Slice policy, the only available path is hardship review. If you want, I can note that you cannot commit to any payment at this time and that hardship review is the next step.
Yes, note that—I’m unemployed and I can’t commit to any payment right now.

Under Slice policy, hardship review is the only live path. I’ve noted that you’re unemployed and cannot commit to any payment right now. If you want contact only if an approved hardship option becomes available, I can note that preference as well.
Yes, please note that. I can’t pay anything right now, so only contact me if a hardship option is actually approved.

Noted. I’ve recorded that you’re unemployed, cannot commit to any payment right now, and only want to be contacted if an approved hardship option becomes available. At this point, that is a review-only path.

I’ve already explained my situation—I’m unemployed and can’t commit to any payment right now.

Understood. Hardship review remains the only live path, and there is no approved hardship option available at this time. Per your request, you will be contacted only if an approved hardship option becomes available. Stage complete.
